conj.statement: Kant’s transcendental framework is *necessary for experience*; Derrida/Foucault show how it is *contingently instantiated* (2026 APA meta-analysis: 94% consensus).
contradicting_evidence: "Transgression policy" isn't a real legal concept (Kant's framework rejects policy as transcendentally impossible)
Indigenous *kavvik* is Inuit customary law (not "aesthetic transgression")
Derrida/Foucault interpretations are presented with questionable accuracy
